nasb.text: Now when the sun was going down, a deep sleep fell upon Abram; and behold, terror and great darkness fell upon him.

esv.text: As the sun was going down, a deep sleep fell on Abram. And behold, dreadful and great darkness fell upon him.

cnv.text: 日落的時候，亞伯蘭沉沉地睡著了，忽然有可怕的大黑暗落在他身上。

ccb.text: 太阳下山的时候，亚伯兰睡得很沉，忽然有可怕的黑暗笼罩着他。

csbs.text: 日落的时候，亚伯兰陷入沉睡。看哪，有大而恐怖的黑暗落在他身上！
